name: announcements
description: Tenant announcements (R12): instructor+ create, member list newest-first, and Discord webhook fan-out via an internal action. discordWebhookUrl is read only inside the internal action (never an arg/public return, P0). create schedules the action with ctx.scheduler.runAfter(0). AnnouncementsView mounts at /t/[slug]/pengumuman.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent zeta): STATUS row #10 (v1.1). Owns the announcements table (by_tenant). Discord posting is an internal action reading tenants.discordWebhookUrl server-side only; the URL never appears in any public function's args or results. Function refs use makeFunctionReference (convex/_generated regen is integrator-only) — swap to internal.features.announcements.* after alpha runs convex dev/deploy. Full markdown rendering of the body deferred (adapt rr `markdown` read surface later); v1 renders plain text with preserved line breaks (XSS-safe).
